data.title: Willis announces leadership appointments to support growth and Newfront integration in North America
data.description: Willis, a subsidiary of WTW business listed on NASDAQ as WTW, made public today in New York that they have appointed senior leaders in North America with the aim of supporting growth and integrating Newfront, a tech-centered specialty insurance broker located in San Francisco. The company has filled six senior leadership positions which underline their dedication to boosting regional capabilities, improving client services, and advancing growth in significant markets.

data.title: StoneX Group Inc. to Announce 2026 Fiscal Second Quarter Earnings on May 6, 2026
data.description: There will be a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 9:00 am Eastern Time (ET).

data.title: OTC Markets Group Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Today, OTC Markets Group Inc. (OTCQX: OTCM) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for Q1 of 2026 on May 6, 2026, after the close of U.S. capital markets. The results will cover the quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Vornado Declares Quarterly Dividends On Preferred Shares
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE:VNO) declared its quarterly preferred dividends.

data.title: Remodeling Experts Troy and Molly Mueller of Sherwood, WI, Clarify Permit Requirements for HelloNation
data.description: In Sherwood, Wisconsin on April 29, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation tackles the question of whether bathroom remodels necessitate permits in the state. Providing clear advice for homeowners in Sherwood and statewide, the article delves into the specifics of bathroom remodel permit regulations.

data.title: Banco Itaú Chile and its New York Branch upgraded to ‘A-’ by S&P Global Ratings
data.description: In Santiago, Chile on April 29, 2026, BANCO ITAÚ CHILE (SSE: ITAUCL) announced an upgrade of its long-term credit rating by S&P Global Ratings. The rating has improved from “BBB+” to “A-” with a stable outlook. This upgrade applies to the bank's New York Branch as well as its senior debt instruments.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Cypress Grove/
data.description: Cypress Grove is introducing its award-winning specialty cheese at Target stores. The news was released on April 24, 2026, by Cypress Grove via PR Newswire. The company has made some adjustments to their original announcement. More information regarding this launch can be found at the conclusion of the corrected news release.

data.title: Expect ARB at $0.15 by May 15th. Recent 2.5% surge looks shaky due to high selling pressure, but smart money bullish at 56.7%.
data.description: There is vulnerability in ARB's 2.5% increase as strong selling pressure outweighs buyer activity. However, significant institutional investors are heavily positioned long at 56.7%, indicating confidence in the current prices. They believe there is value at these levels. The target for ARB is set at $0.15 within the next two weeks.

data.title: RMCAD Celebrates the Class of 2026 on May 1!
data.description: In Lakewood, Colorado on April 29, 2026, Rocky Mountain College of Art + Design (RMCAD) announced that on Friday, May 1, they will honor 334 graduates from both their on-campus and online programs. These graduates represent nearly every state in the U.S. RMCAD, a renowned art and design institution, currently has a student body exceeding 2,000 individuals across 11 different states.
